steps.title: Let's create your first Poll!
steps.description: A poll slide is a quick and easy way to get live opinions from your audience. We'll build one together in under a minute. Click Next to begin.

steps.title: Create a new presentation
steps.description: Click 'New Presentation' to start a fresh deck for your poll.

steps.title: Pick the Poll slide type
steps.description: Select 'Poll' from the slide type list. Your audience will vote on their phones and results update live on screen.

steps.title: Fill in your question
steps.description: Type the question you want your audience to vote on.

action.value: Which day works best for our team meeting?
action.hint: Type your question, then press Enter or click away

steps.title: Add the first answer option
steps.description: Fill in your answer options — you can have between 2 and 30 of them.

steps.title: Add the second answer option
steps.description: Add at least one more option for your audience to choose from.

steps.title: Rehearse with Preview
steps.description: Want to see how your poll will look before going live? Click 'Preview' to rehearse your presentation — no audience needed.

steps.title: This is your audience's phone
steps.description: The participant screen on the right is exactly what your audience sees. Watch — we'll pick an answer and submit it, just like a participant would.

steps.title: Results update live
steps.description: And on the presenter screen, the chart moves the moment the vote lands. This is what your audience watches on the big screen — updating in real time as everyone votes.

steps.title: Head back to the editor
steps.description: Done rehearsing? Click the back arrow to return to the editor.

action.hint: Click the back arrow to continue

steps.title: Ready to go live!
steps.description: That's the minimum for any poll slide — and you can always rehearse with Preview first. When it's showtime, press 'Present' in the top-right corner: your audience joins on their phones and results update live as they vote.
